basic_details.job_title: NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 21 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Fertilizers Limited (NFL) – A Navratna Central Public Sector Enterprise
basic_details.post_name: Management Trainee (E-1 Level) in Marketing, F&A, Materials, IT, Electrical, Chemical
basic_details.department: Various Units/Offices of National Fertilizers Limited
basic_details.short_information: NFL Recruitment 2026: Get the latest National Fertilizers Limited recruitment notification 2026 for 21 Management Trainee (E-1 Level) vacancies in various disciplines including Marketing, Finance & Accounts, Materials, Information Technology, Electrical, and Chemical across NFL Units/Offices in India. The online application process starts on 13th May 2026 and the last date to apply online is 12th June 2026. Find NFL Management Trainee vacancies on the official website https://www.nationalfertilizers.com/. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026" not

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified on official website
important_dates.interview_date: To be notified after written exam results

application_fee.details: Application fee must be paid online during the application process. SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/Departmental candidates are exempted from payment of application fee.

age_limit.details: Age limit is calculated as on 30-04-2026 (cut-off date for eligibility). Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen/Departmental candidates as per Government of India rules.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions including educational qualification and age limit as on the cut-off date (30-04-2026). Educational qualifications must be from recognized Universities/Institutions with minimum 60% marks (50% for reserved categories - SC/ST/OBC/PwBD). | Discipline-wise Educational Qualification Requirements | Minimum Percentage Requirement:

salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be engaged as Management Trainees at E-1 Level with pay scale of Rs. 40,000 - 1,40,000. During the training period, candidates will receive a basic pay of Rs. 40,000 per month along with admissible allowances. After successful completion of training and regularization, candidates will be placed in the regular pay scale with all benefits applicable to NFL employees. | Additional Benefits (after regularization): | Dearness Allowance (DA) as per Government norms House Rent Allowance (HRA) Transport Allowance Other allowances as applicable Provident Fund Gratuity Medical facilities Leave entitlements Performance Related Pay (PRP)

selection_process: 1. Written Examination Offline OMR Based Written Examination (150 marks) 80% weightage
2. Personal Interview Face-to-face interview to assess personality, communication skills, and suitability 20% weightage
3. Document Verification Verification of original documents and certificates Mandatory
4. Medical Examination Pre-employment medical fitness test Mandatory

The selection process for NFL Management Trainee Recruitment 2026 consists of Offline OMR Based Written Examination (150 marks with 80% weightage) and Personal Interview (20% weightage). Final merit will be prepared based on combined marks (80% Written + 20% Interview). Selected candidates will undergo Document Verification and Medical Examination.
Final Merit = 80% (Written Examination Marks) + 20% (Personal Interview Marks) Selection will be based on merit in respective discipline/category
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the National Fertilizers Limited official website (www.nationalfertilizers.com). No other mode of application will be accepted. The online portal is active from 13-05-2026 to 12-06-2026. An edit/correction window will be available from 14-06-2026 to 15-06-2026.
Step 1: Visit NFL Official Website - Go to www.nationalfertilizers.com → Careers → Recruitment in NFL
Step 2: Register - Register with valid Email ID and Mobile Number to create login credentials
Step 3: Login - Login using generated credentials
Step 4: Fill Application Form - Fill the online application form carefully with all required details including personal information, educational qualifications, post preference, etc.

Step 5: Upload Documents - Upload scanned copies of required documents: Recent passport-size photograph (as per specifications) Signature (as per specifications) Educational certificates and mark sheets Category certificates (if applicable)
Step 6: Pay Application Fee - Pay application fee online (if applicable) through available payment modes
Step 7: Submit Application - Review all details carefully and submit the application
Step 8: Take Printout - Take printout of submitted application for future reference
Only one application per candidate per post is allowed
Option for post preference must be exercised carefully
Apply Online at: www.nationalfertilizers.com (Careers → Recruitment in NFL)
important_instructions: Cut-off date for eligibility (age, qualification etc.): 30-04-2026 Age limit: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 27 years (relaxation as per category) Educational qualification: Minimum 60% marks (50% for reserved categories) in qualifying degree Only one application per candidate per post is allowed Application fee: Rs. 700/- + Bank Charges for General/OBC/EWS; Exempted for SC/ST/PwBD/ExSM/Departmental candidates Last date for online application: 12-06-2026 Edit/Correction window: 14-06-2026 to 15-06-2026 Option for post preference must be exercised carefully at the time of application Candidates must be willing to serve anywhere in India Selection through: Written Examination (80%) + Personal Interview (20%) Final merit based on combined marks of Written Exam and Interview Document Verification and Medical Examination mandatory for selected candidates Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate All updates will be available only on NFL's official website Candidates are advised to visit official website regularly for updates regarding admit card, exam schedule, results, and interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the full form of NFL?
faq.answer: NFL stands for National Fertilizers Limited, a Government of India Navratna PSU.

faq.question: Q2. How many Management Trainee vacancies are there in NFL 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 21 Management Trainee vacancies across different disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the starting date to apply online?
faq.answer: The online application process starts on 13-05-2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to submit the online application?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications is 12-06-2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for NFL Management Trainee?
faq.answer: Candidates will be selected based on online application scrutiny, written test, and/or interview as per the official notification.
